<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   <!-- Widget JavaScript bundle -->
  <script src="https://cloud.google.com/ai/gen-app-builder/client?hl=en_US"></script><script src="https://www.gstatic.com/_/mss/boq-cloud-ai-ucs/_/js/k=boq-cloud-ai-ucs.UcsWidgetUi.en_US.I9T4Ig27qLo.2021.O/am=AABO/d=1/rs=AAj4NmyVUH6zThvp2uAlileIslTgRDNtOQ/m=bootstrap_module,ucs_widget_module,xlite_module" async=""></script>

  <!-- Chatbot -->
  </head><body><df-messenger location="us-central1" project-id="se-gcp-348466" agent-id="d7ae98af-e734-4ad5-bd74-83d923a164ce" language-code="en" max-query-length="-1">
    <df-messenger-chat-bubble chat-collapse-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/south_east_24dp.svg" chat-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/TSG_Chatbot_48x48_v1-01-01.svg" chat-title-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/TSG_Chatbot_48x48_v1-01-01.svg" chat-title="Virtual Assistant">
    </df-messenger-chat-bubble>
  </df-messenger>

  <script>
        // Wait for DOM load
        let langselcnt = 'first';
        let isFirstOpen = true; // Flag to track first chat open

        // Track chat state in sessionStorage
        function updateChatState(isOpen) {
            sessionStorage.setItem('isChatOpen', isOpen);
            console.log(`Chat state updated: isOpen = `);
        }

        // Function to wait for an element to be available
        function waitForElement(selector, callback) {
            const element = document.querySelector(selector);
            if (element) {
                callback(element);
            } else {
                setTimeout(() => waitForElement(selector, callback), 100);
            }
        }

          // Function to get the language of the browser
            function getBrowserLanguage() {
            //const lang = navigator.language || navigator.userLanguage;
			 const lang = document.documentElement.lang;
             console.log(`Detected browser language: `);

                // Function to store focus state
                function storeFocusState() {
            const activeElement = document.activeElement;
            if (activeElement) {
                sessionStorage.setItem('focusedElement', activeElement.id || activeElement.className);
                console.log(`Focus state stored: false`);
            }
        }

        // Function to restore focus state
function restoreFocusState() {
    const focusedData = sessionStorage.getItem('focusedElement');
    if (focusedData) {
        try {
            const {type, value} = JSON.parse(focusedData);
            let element;
            if (type === 'id') {
                element = document.getElementById(value);
            } else if (type === 'class') {
                element = document.querySelector(`.`);
            }
            if (element) {
                element.focus();
                console.log(`Focus state restored:  `);
            }
        } catch (e) {
            console.warn('Failed to restore focus state', e);
        }
    }
}

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            const isChatOpen = sessionStorage.getItem('isChatOpen') === 'true';
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log(`Page loaded. isChatOpen = , selectedLanguage = `);
			
			// Restore focus state
                restoreFocusState();

            // If the chat was open before the page refresh, disable the dropdown
            if (isChatOpen) {
                console.log("Chat was open before refresh. Disabling dropdown...");
                waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                    const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                    if (languageDropdown) {
                        languageDropdown.disabled = true; // Disable dropdown
                        console.log("languageDropdown is ", languageDropdown);
                        const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                        dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Set language to selected Language.
                        console.log("Language code is ", selectedLanguage);
                    }
                });
            }

            // Select the df-messenger-chat-bubble element
            waitForElement("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                // Access its Shadow DOM
                const shadowRoot = chatBubble.shadowRoot;

                // Create the tooltip element
                const tooltip = document.createElement("div");
                tooltip.className = "language-tooltip";
                tooltip.innerHTML = `
                    <h6>
                        <span>Language</span>
                        <div class="language-dropdown">
                            <select onchange="changeLanguage(this)">
                                <option value="en">English</option>
                                <option value="es">Español</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                    </h6>
                `;

                // Append the tooltip to the title bar
                const titleBar = shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title");
                if (titleBar) {
                    titleBar.appendChild(tooltip);
                }

                // Check if the dropdown should be disabled
                const languageDropdown = shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                if (sessionStorage.getItem('isDropdownDisabled') === 'true') {
                    languageDropdown.disabled = true;
                }
                // Set the dropdown to the selected language
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;

                // Set the language for the text area
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
            });
        });

        // Function to change the language
        function changeLanguage(selectElement) {
            const languageCode = selectElement.value;
            const languageName = selectElement.options[selectElement.selectedIndex].text;

            // Update the chatbot's language
            const dfMessenger = document.querySelector("df-messenger");
            dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", languageCode);

            // Disable the dropdown after selection
            waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                if (languageDropdown) {
                    languageDropdown.disabled = true; // Disable dropdown
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isDropdownDisabled', 'true'); // Store the state in sessionStorage
                    sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', languageCode); // Store the selected language in sessionStorage
                    console.log("Language dropdown disabled after selection inside Language Change");
                }
            });

            if (langselcnt === 'first') {
                dfMessenger.sendRequest('event', 'auto_welcome_message');
                langselcnt = 'changed';
            }
        }

            // Update the tooltip text
            const tooltipSpan = document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector(".language-tooltip span");
    
        document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.title-text > h2")
       .outerHTML = '<h4>' + document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble")
       .shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar")
       .shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.title-text > h2").innerHTML + '</h4>';

      // Event listeners
      window.addEventListener('df-chat-open-changed', (event) => {
            const isOpen = event.detail.isOpen;
            console.log(`df-chat-open-changed: isOpen = `);
            const selectedLanguage = getBrowserLanguage();
			sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', selectedLanguage); 
			updateChatState(isOpen); // Update chat state in sessionStorage
            if (isOpen) {
                // Enable the language dropdown when the chat is opened
                waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                    const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                  //  const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
                    console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                  /*  if(selectedLanguage){
                        languageDropdown.disabled = true; 
                        console.log('languageDropdown is in event.detail.isOpen if selectedLanguage state:', selectedLanguage);
                    }*/
                    console.log('languageDropdown is in event.detail.isOpen if state:', languageDropdown);
                    if (languageDropdown && isFirstOpen) {
                        languageDropdown.disabled = false;
                        languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                        isFirstOpen = false;
                    }
                    const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                    dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
                    dfMessenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: false });
                    dfMessenger.sendRequest('event', 'auto_welcome_message');
                    console.log(`in IF Chat is closed`);
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = false;
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = "";
                    const chatBubbleEl = document.querySelector('df-messenger-chat-bubble');
                    const buttonEl = chatBubbleEl.shadowRoot.querySelector('div > .close-button');
                });
            } else {
                console.log(`in Else Chat is closed`);
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = "";
                sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', selectedLanguage); // Reset the selected language to English
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
                langselcnt = 'first';
               // selectedLanguage = 'en';
                isFirstOpen = true;
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-chip-clicked', (event) => {
            console.log("df-chip-clicked->" + event.detail.querySelector);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in Chip clicked:', languageDropdown);

                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-session-ended', () => {
            const messenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage');
            if (selectedLanguage === 'es') {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Sesión completa*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            } else {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Session complete*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            }
            messenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').value = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = true;
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = '2px solid var(--df-messenger-focus-color, var(--df-messenger-default-focus-color))';
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-session-expired', () => {
            const messenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage');
            if (selectedLanguage === 'es') {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Sesión caducada, cierre el chat y vuelva a abrirlo*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            } else {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Session expired please close the chat and reopen*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            }
            messenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').value = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = true;
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = '2px solid var(--df-messenger-focus-color, var(--df-messenger-default-focus-color))';
        });
        // Store focus state on click and keypress
        document.addEventListener('click', storeFocusState);
        document.addEventListener('keypress', storeFocusState);

<style>
    /* Styles for the language tooltip */
    .language-tooltip {
      position: absolute;
      top: 10px;
      right: 60px; /* Position before the close button */
      background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
      color: white;
      padding: 5px 10px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      font-size: 12px;
      z-index: 1000;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
    }

    .language-tooltip:hover {
      background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
    }



    .language-dropdown {
      display: none;
      position: absolute;
      top: 100%;
      right: 0;
      background-color: white;
      border: 1px solid #ccc;
      border-radius: 4px;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
      z-index: 1000;
    }

    .language-dropdown button {
      display: block;
      width: 100%;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      background-color: white;
      border: none;
      text-align: left;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .language-dropdown button:hover {
      background-color: #f0f0f0;
    }

    .language-tooltip:hover .language-dropdown {
      display: block;
    }

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
    let timers = [];

    // Multilingual stages with absolute times (since last activity)
    const stages = [
      {
        time: 5 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "I haven’t heard from you in a while. Would you like to continue?",
          es: "Hace tiempo que no sé de ti. ¿Quieres continuar?"
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_5MIN"
      },
      {
        time: 15 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "This session will remain open for a few more minutes. Please respond if you’d like to continue.",
          es: "Esta sesión permanecerá abierta unos minutos más. Por favor responde si deseas continuar."
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_15MIN"
      }
    ];

    function getCurrentLang() {
      return dfMessenger.getAttribute("language-code") || "en";
    }

    function scheduleTimers() {
      // Clear any existing timers
      timers.forEach(t => clearTimeout(t));
      timers = [];

      const lang = getCurrentLang();

      // Schedule all stages relative to now
      stages.forEach(stage => {
        const t = setTimeout(() => {
          const message = stage.messages[lang] || stage.messages["en"];
          console.log(`Stage  (lang=)`);

          dfMessenger.renderCustomText(message);
          dfMessenger.sendRequest({ event: stage.event });
        }, stage.time);

        timers.push(t);
      });
    }

    function resetInactivity() {
      console.log("Reset inactivity + reschedule all timers");
      scheduleTimers();
    }

    // Reset on user or bot activity
    window.addEventListener("df-request-sent", resetInactivity);
    window.addEventListener("df-response-received", resetInactivity);

    // Watch language changes
    const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {
      mutations.forEach(mutation => {
        if (mutation.attributeName === "language-code") {
          console.log("Language changed to:", getCurrentLang());
        }
      });
    });
    observer.observe(dfMessenger, { attributes: true });

    // Start timers at load
    scheduleTimers();
  });
</script>

<div class="tsg-rwd-text parbase section">

<div style="margin-top:5px">

     
    <p></p><p>There are important steps required after adopting a child. Read below to learn more about what to expect after adoption, including:</p>
<ul>
<li><b>Acquiring U.S. Citizenship for your Child</b>: It is important to ensure your adopted child becomes a U.S. citizen. If you postpone documenting or obtaining your child's citizenship, he or she may have difficulty obtaining college scholarships, working legally, voting, and enjoying other rights and privileges. In some cases, the child might even be subject to deportation. </li>
<li><b>Post Adoption Reporting: </b>Many countries require adoptive parents or adoption service providers to report on the child’s progress and welfare after an adoption has concluded, sometimes for several years after the adoption took place. These reports generally cover the child's development and progress adjusting to his or her new family and life in a new country. Post-adoption reports provide an important opportunity for the adoptive parents and the child to discuss the progress of the adoption. </li>
<li><b>Post-Placement Reporting</b>: Some countries grant only provisional approval of an adoption pending a child’s residence for several months with the adoptive family in their country. Those countries may then require prospective adoptive parents to submit periodic <i>post-placement reports</i>. Based on these reports, the child’s country of origin evaluates whether the child and parents are bonding, and how well the child is settling into the new culture and family environment. </li>
<li><b>Understanding Reporting Requirements:</b> The specific requirements vary from country to country, are sometimes quite detailed, and may extend until adopted children turn 18 (or even older in a few rare cases). Your adoption service provider, the <a href="https://travel.state.gov/content/travel/en/Intercountry-Adoption/Intercountry-Adoption-Country-Information.html">country specific adoption information</a> available on this website, and the U.S. embassy or consulate in the child’s country of origin will also help better understand reporting requirements in the specific country that you are adopting from. In addition, country specific requirements are organized by region on the following page: <a href="/content/travel/en/Intercountry-Adoption/post-adoption/post-adoption-reporting.html" adhocenable="false">Post-Adoption Reporting Overview</a>. </li>
<li><b>Post-Adoption Services</b>: Post-adoption services may include: support groups, education, social and cultural activities, camps, therapists, medical resources, assistance in the search for family, and access to files. There are many public and private nonprofit organizations that provide such post-adoption resources and services. There are also numerous adoptive family support groups and adult adoptee organizations active in the United States that provide a network of options for adoptive families who wish to have contact with other adoptees or adoptive families from the same country of origin.</li>
</ul>
<p></p>

</div></div>

gold_text:
Post Adoption

There are important steps required after adopting a child. Read below to learn more about what to expect after adoption, including:

Acquiring U.S. Citizenship for your Child: It is important to ensure your adopted child becomes a U.S. citizen. If you postpone documenting or obtaining your child's citizenship, he or she may have difficulty obtaining college scholarships, working legally, voting, and enjoying other rights and privileges. In some cases, the child might even be subject to deportation. 
Post Adoption Reporting: Many countries require adoptive parents or adoption service providers to report on the child’s progress and welfare after an adoption has concluded, sometimes for several years after the adoption took place. These reports generally cover the child's development and progress adjusting to his or her new family and life in a new country. Post-adoption reports provide an important opportunity for the adoptive parents and the child to discuss the progress of the adoption. 
Post-Placement Reporting: Some countries grant only provisional approval of an adoption pending a child’s residence for several months with the adoptive family in their country. Those countries may then require prospective adoptive parents to submit periodic post-placement reports. Based on these reports, the child’s country of origin evaluates whether the child and parents are bonding, and how well the child is settling into the new culture and family environment. 
Understanding Reporting Requirements: The specific requirements vary from country to country, are sometimes quite detailed, and may extend until adopted children turn 18 (or even older in a few rare cases). Your adoption service provider, the country specific adoption information available on this website, and the U.S. embassy or consulate in the child’s country of origin will also help better understand reporting requirements in the specific country that you are adopting from. In addition, country specific requirements are organized by region on the following page: Post-Adoption Reporting Overview. 
Post-Adoption Services: Post-adoption services may include: support groups, education, social and cultural activities, camps, therapists, medical resources, assistance in the search for family, and access to files. There are many public and private nonprofit organizations that provide such post-adoption resources and services. There are also numerous adoptive family support groups and adult adoptee organizations active in the United States that provide a network of options for adoptive families who wish to have contact with other adoptees or adoptive families from the same country of origin.

   <!-- Widget JavaScript bundle -->
  <script src="https://cloud.google.com/ai/gen-app-builder/client?hl=en_US"></script><script src="https://www.gstatic.com/_/mss/boq-cloud-ai-ucs/_/js/k=boq-cloud-ai-ucs.UcsWidgetUi.en_US.I9T4Ig27qLo.2021.O/am=AABO/d=1/rs=AAj4NmyVUH6zThvp2uAlileIslTgRDNtOQ/m=bootstrap_module,ucs_widget_module,xlite_module" async=""></script>

  <!-- Chatbot -->
  </head><body><df-messenger location="us-central1" project-id="se-gcp-348466" agent-id="d7ae98af-e734-4ad5-bd74-83d923a164ce" language-code="en" max-query-length="-1">
    <df-messenger-chat-bubble chat-collapse-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/south_east_24dp.svg" chat-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/TSG_Chatbot_48x48_v1-01-01.svg" chat-title-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/TSG_Chatbot_48x48_v1-01-01.svg" chat-title="Virtual Assistant">
    </df-messenger-chat-bubble>
  </df-messenger>

  <script>
        // Wait for DOM load
        let langselcnt = 'first';
        let isFirstOpen = true; // Flag to track first chat open

        // Track chat state in sessionStorage
        function updateChatState(isOpen) {
            sessionStorage.setItem('isChatOpen', isOpen);
            console.log(`Chat state updated: isOpen = `);
        }

        // Function to wait for an element to be available
        function waitForElement(selector, callback) {
            const element = document.querySelector(selector);
            if (element) {
                callback(element);
            } else {
                setTimeout(() => waitForElement(selector, callback), 100);
            }
        }

          // Function to get the language of the browser
            function getBrowserLanguage() {
            //const lang = navigator.language || navigator.userLanguage;
			 const lang = document.documentElement.lang;
             console.log(`Detected browser language: `);
              if (lang.startsWith('es')) {
                     return 'es';
                } else {
                    return 'en';
         }
        }

                // Function to store focus state
                function storeFocusState() {
            const activeElement = document.activeElement;
            if (activeElement) {
                sessionStorage.setItem('focusedElement', activeElement.id || activeElement.className);
                console.log(`Focus state stored: false`);
            }
        }

        // Function to restore focus state
function restoreFocusState() {
    const focusedData = sessionStorage.getItem('focusedElement');
    if (focusedData) {
        try {
            const {type, value} = JSON.parse(focusedData);
            let element;
            if (type === 'id') {
                element = document.getElementById(value);
            } else if (type === 'class') {
                element = document.querySelector(`.`);
            }
            if (element) {
                element.focus();
                console.log(`Focus state restored:  `);
            }
        } catch (e) {
            console.warn('Failed to restore focus state', e);
        }
    }
}

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            const isChatOpen = sessionStorage.getItem('isChatOpen') === 'true';
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log(`Page loaded. isChatOpen = , selectedLanguage = `);
			
			// Restore focus state
                restoreFocusState();

            // If the chat was open before the page refresh, disable the dropdown
            if (isChatOpen) {
                console.log("Chat was open before refresh. Disabling dropdown...");
                waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                    const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                    if (languageDropdown) {
                        languageDropdown.disabled = true; // Disable dropdown
                        console.log("languageDropdown is ", languageDropdown);
                        const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                        dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Set language to selected Language.
                        console.log("Language code is ", selectedLanguage);
                    }
                });
            }

            // Select the df-messenger-chat-bubble element
            waitForElement("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                // Access its Shadow DOM
                const shadowRoot = chatBubble.shadowRoot;

                // Create the tooltip element
                const tooltip = document.createElement("div");
                tooltip.className = "language-tooltip";
                tooltip.innerHTML = `
                    <h6>
                        <span>Language</span>
                        <div class="language-dropdown">
                            <select onchange="changeLanguage(this)">
                                <option value="en">English</option>
                                <option value="es">Español</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                    </h6>
                `;

                // Append the tooltip to the title bar
                const titleBar = shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title");
                if (titleBar) {
                    titleBar.appendChild(tooltip);
                }

                // Check if the dropdown should be disabled
                const languageDropdown = shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                if (sessionStorage.getItem('isDropdownDisabled') === 'true') {
                    languageDropdown.disabled = true;
                }
                // Set the dropdown to the selected language
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;

                // Set the language for the text area
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
            });
        });

        // Function to change the language
        function changeLanguage(selectElement) {
            const languageCode = selectElement.value;
            const languageName = selectElement.options[selectElement.selectedIndex].text;

            // Update the chatbot's language
            const dfMessenger = document.querySelector("df-messenger");
            dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", languageCode);

            // Disable the dropdown after selection
            waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                if (languageDropdown) {
                    languageDropdown.disabled = true; // Disable dropdown
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isDropdownDisabled', 'true'); // Store the state in sessionStorage
                    sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', languageCode); // Store the selected language in sessionStorage
                    console.log("Language dropdown disabled after selection inside Language Change");
                }
            });

            if (langselcnt === 'first') {
                dfMessenger.sendRequest('event', 'auto_welcome_message');
                langselcnt = 'changed';
            }
        }

            // Update the tooltip text
            const tooltipSpan = document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector(".language-tooltip span");
    
        document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.title-text > h2")
       .outerHTML = '<h4>' + document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble")
       .shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar")
       .shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.title-text > h2").innerHTML + '</h4>';

      // Event listeners
      window.addEventListener('df-chat-open-changed', (event) => {
            const isOpen = event.detail.isOpen;
            console.log(`df-chat-open-changed: isOpen = `);
            const selectedLanguage = getBrowserLanguage();
			sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', selectedLanguage); 
			updateChatState(isOpen); // Update chat state in sessionStorage
            if (isOpen) {
                // Enable the language dropdown when the chat is opened
                waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                    const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                  //  const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
                    console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                  /*  if(selectedLanguage){
                        languageDropdown.disabled = true; 
                        console.log('languageDropdown is in event.detail.isOpen if selectedLanguage state:', selectedLanguage);
                    }*/
                    console.log('languageDropdown is in event.detail.isOpen if state:', languageDropdown);
                    if (languageDropdown && isFirstOpen) {
                        languageDropdown.disabled = false;
                        languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                        isFirstOpen = false;
                    }
                    const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                    dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
                    dfMessenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: false });
                    dfMessenger.sendRequest('event', 'auto_welcome_message');
                    console.log(`in IF Chat is closed`);
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = false;
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = "";
                    const chatBubbleEl = document.querySelector('df-messenger-chat-bubble');
                    const buttonEl = chatBubbleEl.shadowRoot.querySelector('div > .close-button');
                });
            } else {
                console.log(`in Else Chat is closed`);
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = "";
                sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', selectedLanguage); // Reset the selected language to English
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
                langselcnt = 'first';
               // selectedLanguage = 'en';
                isFirstOpen = true;
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-chip-clicked', (event) => {
            console.log("df-chip-clicked->" + event.detail.querySelector);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in Chip clicked:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage')|| getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage || languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
               // const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
           // const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
        });
        window.addEventListener('df-user-input-entered', (event) => {
            console.log(event.detail.input);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in user Input:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage || languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
             //   const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || 'en';
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-button-clicked', (actionLink) => {
            console.log(actionLink);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in button actionLink:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage')|| getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage||languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
                //const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || 'en';
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-session-ended', () => {
            const messenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage');
            if (selectedLanguage === 'es') {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Sesión completa*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            } else {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Session complete*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            }
            messenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').value = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = true;
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = '2px solid var(--df-messenger-focus-color, var(--df-messenger-default-focus-color))';
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-session-expired', () => {
            const messenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage');
            if (selectedLanguage === 'es') {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Sesión caducada, cierre el chat y vuelva a abrirlo*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            } else {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Session expired please close the chat and reopen*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            }
            messenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').value = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = true;
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = '2px solid var(--df-messenger-focus-color, var(--df-messenger-default-focus-color))';
        });
        // Store focus state on click and keypress
        document.addEventListener('click', storeFocusState);
        document.addEventListener('keypress', storeFocusState);
  </script>

<style>
    /* Styles for the language tooltip */
    .language-tooltip {
      position: absolute;
      top: 10px;
      right: 60px; /* Position before the close button */
      background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
      color: white;
      padding: 5px 10px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      font-size: 12px;
      z-index: 1000;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
    }

    .language-tooltip:hover {
      background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
    }



    .language-dropdown {
      display: none;
      position: absolute;
      top: 100%;
      right: 0;
      background-color: white;
      border: 1px solid #ccc;
      border-radius: 4px;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
      z-index: 1000;
    }

    .language-dropdown button {
      display: block;
      width: 100%;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      background-color: white;
      border: none;
      text-align: left;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .language-dropdown button:hover {
      background-color: #f0f0f0;
    }

    .language-tooltip:hover .language-dropdown {
      display: block;
    }

    df-messenger {

      z-index: 999;
    position: fixed;

    bottom: 16px;
    right: 16px;

/* Chat Window Styling */

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
    let timers = [];

    // Multilingual stages with absolute times (since last activity)
    const stages = [
      {
        time: 5 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "I haven’t heard from you in a while. Would you like to continue?",
          es: "Hace tiempo que no sé de ti. ¿Quieres continuar?"
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_5MIN"
      },
      {
        time: 15 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "This session will remain open for a few more minutes. Please respond if you’d like to continue.",
          es: "Esta sesión permanecerá abierta unos minutos más. Por favor responde si deseas continuar."
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_15MIN"
      }
    ];

    function getCurrentLang() {
      return dfMessenger.getAttribute("language-code") || "en";
    }

    function scheduleTimers() {
      // Clear any existing timers
      timers.forEach(t => clearTimeout(t));
      timers = [];

      const lang = getCurrentLang();

      // Schedule all stages relative to now
      stages.forEach(stage => {
        const t = setTimeout(() => {
          const message = stage.messages[lang] || stage.messages["en"];
          console.log(`Stage  (lang=)`);

          dfMessenger.renderCustomText(message);
          dfMessenger.sendRequest({ event: stage.event });
        }, stage.time);

        timers.push(t);
      });
    }

    function resetInactivity() {
      console.log("Reset inactivity + reschedule all timers");
      scheduleTimers();
    }

    // Reset on user or bot activity
    window.addEventListener("df-request-sent", resetInactivity);
    window.addEventListener("df-response-received", resetInactivity);

    // Watch language changes
    const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {
      mutations.forEach(mutation => {
        if (mutation.attributeName === "language-code") {
          console.log("Language changed to:", getCurrentLang());
        }
      });
    });
    observer.observe(dfMessenger, { attributes: true });

    // Start timers at load
    scheduleTimers();
  });
</script>

        <div class="tsg-rwd-main-copy-body-frame">
            <div class="tsg-rwd-page-subheader">
                <a name="inner-content" id="inner-content" href="javascript:void(0);" title="start of main content"></a>
                <h1>Adoption Process</h1>
            </div>
            <div class="tsg-rwd-content-page-parsysxxx parsys"><div class="tsg-rwd-text parbase section">

<div style="margin-top:5px">

     
    <p></p><p>This section provides an overview of the U.S. intercountry adoption process, which must comply with U.S. federal law as well as the laws of a prospective adoptive parent’s state of residence and the prospective adoptive child’s country of origin. Adoption and immigration procedures will vary depending on whether or not the child’s country of origin is a signatory to the <a href="https://travel.state.gov/content/adoptionsabroad/en/hague-convention/understanding-the-hague-convention.html">Hague Adoption Convention</a>.</p>
<p>Over 100 nations, including the United States are party to the <a href="https://travel.state.gov/content/travel/en/Intercountry-Adoption/Adoption-Process/understanding-the-hague-convention.html">Hague Adoption Convention</a>. The <a href="#ExternalPopup" class="pdf_link ext_link" data-toggle="modal" data-url="http://www.gpo.gov/fdsys/pkg/PLAW-106publ279/pdf/PLAW-106publ279.pdf">Intercountry Adoption Act of 2000<span class="far fa-file-pdf pdf_link"></span><span class="fa fa-external-link-alt ext_link"></span></a> (IAA) implemented the Convention in the United States. An important requirement under the IAA is that any agency or person who wishes to provide services for an intercountry adoption in a Convention country must be accredited or approved to do so. In July 2014, the <a href="https://travel.state.gov/content/travel/en/Intercountry-Adoption/adopt_ref/universal-accreditation-act-of-2012-2.html">Universal Accreditation Act of 2012</a> extended many of the Convention’s safeguards to intercountry adoption cases from non-Convention countries as well.</p>
<p>Contacting an <a href="https://travel.state.gov/content/travel/en/Intercountry-Adoption/about-adoption-service-providers/adoption-service-provider-search.html">accredited or approved adoption service provider (ASP)</a> to ask specific questions related to a prospective adoptive parent’s circumstances is generally a good place to start. Prospective adoptive parents may wish to review the information on our website and then follow up with an ASP with any additional questions you have.</p>
<p><b>Additional Resources</b></p>
<ul>
<li>The Department of Health and Human Services’ Child Welfare Information Gateway website includes many resources for U.S. citizens and residents who wish to adopt. The publication <a href="#ExternalPopup" class="ext_link" data-toggle="modal" data-url="https://www.childwelfare.gov/pubs/factsheets-families-intercountry/">Intercountry Adoption: What Do I Need To Know?<span class="fa fa-external-link-alt ext_link"></span></a> is available for prospective adoptive parents just beginning the adoption process.<br>
<br>
</li>
<li>Accrediting entities are responsible for the accreditation, approval, monitoring, and oversight of ASPs. The <a href="https://gcc02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ceadoption.org%2F&data=05%7C02%7COCSContentManager%40state.gov%7C472fbcc5c0db43fe434d08de02a0dba9%7C66cf50745afe48d1a691a12b2121f44b%7C0%7C0%7C638951087056463155%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=vpLGw%2FSzA7ET3kz1xjoNvuzWBdwuyBVsgDP75W%2BW4uo%3D&reserved=0" adhocenable="false">Center for Excellence in Adoption Services (CEAS)</a> maintains information on their website about <a href="https://gcc02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ceadoption.org%2Faspdirectory&data=05%7C02%7COCSContentManager%40state.gov%7C472fbcc5c0db43fe434d08de02a0dba9%7C66cf50745afe48d1a691a12b2121f44b%7C0%7C0%7C638951087056481012%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=4cfgoEpPnHXaQpoeCaPgYfpEDvv1WUCg9NaLNYgO5ro%3D&reserved=0" adhocenable="false">Accredited/Approved Agencies/Persons</a> and the countries in which they work.<br>
<b>Please note:</b> While the agency that conducts your <a href="#ExternalPopup" class="ext_link" data-toggle="modal" data-url="https://www.uscis.gov/adoption/home-study-information">home study<span class="fa fa-external-link-alt ext_link"></span></a> must be licensed in your state of residence, the ASP you select to be your Primary Provider (often referred to as a “placing agency”) for an intercountry adoption does not.  <br>
<br>
</li>
<li><a href="#ExternalPopup" class="ext_link" data-toggle="modal" data-url="https://www.uscis.gov/adoption">U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services’<span class="fa fa-external-link-alt ext_link"></span></a> (USCIS) has jurisdiction over certain aspects of the intercountry adoption process, including determining that prospective adoptive parents are suitable and eligible to adopt, home studies, and the child’s immigration to the United States. ASPs generally guide prospective adoptive parents through the process of filing required forms and information with USCIS. </li>
</ul>
<p></p>

</div></div>

gold_text:
Adoption Process

This section provides an overview of the U.S. intercountry adoption process, which must comply with U.S. federal law as well as the laws of a prospective adoptive parent’s state of residence and the prospective adoptive child’s country of origin. Adoption and immigration procedures will vary depending on whether or not the child’s country of origin is a signatory to the Hague Adoption Convention.

Over 100 nations, including the United States are party to the Hague Adoption Convention. The Intercountry Adoption Act of 2000 (IAA) implemented the Convention in the United States. An important requirement under the IAA is that any agency or person who wishes to provide services for an intercountry adoption in a Convention country must be accredited or approved to do so. In July 2014, the Universal Accreditation Act of 2012 extended many of the Convention’s safeguards to intercountry adoption cases from non-Convention countries as well.

Contacting an accredited or approved adoption service provider (ASP) to ask specific questions related to a prospective adoptive parent’s circumstances is generally a good place to start. Prospective adoptive parents may wish to review the information on our website and then follow up with an ASP with any additional questions you have.

Additional Resources

The Department of Health and Human Services’ Child Welfare Information Gateway website includes many resources for U.S. citizens and residents who wish to adopt. The publication Intercountry Adoption: What Do I Need To Know? is available for prospective adoptive parents just beginning the adoption process.
Accrediting entities are responsible for the accreditation, approval, monitoring, and oversight of ASPs. The Center for Excellence in Adoption Services (CEAS) maintains information on their website about Accredited/Approved Agencies/Persons and the countries in which they work.
Please note: While the agency that conducts your home study must be licensed in your state of residence, the ASP you select to be your Primary Provider (often referred to as a “placing agency”) for an intercountry adoption does not.  
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services’ (USCIS) has jurisdiction over certain aspects of the intercountry adoption process, including determining that prospective adoptive parents are suitable and eligible to adopt, home studies, and the child’s immigration to the United States. ASPs generally guide prospective adoptive parents through the process of filing required forms and information with USCIS.

title: What is a U.S. Visa?

  <!-- Chatbot -->
  </head><body><df-messenger location="us-central1" project-id="se-gcp-348466" agent-id="d7ae98af-e734-4ad5-bd74-83d923a164ce" language-code="en" max-query-length="-1">
    <df-messenger-chat-bubble chat-collapse-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/south_east_24dp.svg" chat-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/TSG_Chatbot_48x48_v1-01-01.svg" chat-title-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/TSG_Chatbot_48x48_v1-01-01.svg" chat-title="Virtual Assistant">

  <script>
        // Wait for DOM load
        let langselcnt = 'first';
        let isFirstOpen = true; // Flag to track first chat open

        // Track chat state in sessionStorage
        function updateChatState(isOpen) {
            sessionStorage.setItem('isChatOpen', isOpen);
            console.log(`Chat state updated: isOpen = `);
        }

        // Function to wait for an element to be available
        function waitForElement(selector, callback) {
            const element = document.querySelector(selector);
            if (element) {
                callback(element);
            } else {
                setTimeout(() => waitForElement(selector, callback), 100);
            }
        }

          // Function to get the language of the browser
            function getBrowserLanguage() {
            //const lang = navigator.language || navigator.userLanguage;
			 const lang = document.documentElement.lang;
             console.log(`Detected browser language: `);
              if (lang.startsWith('es')) {
                     return 'es';
                } else {
                    return 'en';
         }
        }

                // Function to store focus state
                function storeFocusState() {
            const activeElement = document.activeElement;
            if (activeElement) {
                sessionStorage.setItem('focusedElement', activeElement.id || activeElement.className);
                console.log(`Focus state stored: false`);
            }
        }

        // Function to restore focus state
function restoreFocusState() {
    const focusedData = sessionStorage.getItem('focusedElement');
    if (focusedData) {
        try {
            const {type, value} = JSON.parse(focusedData);
            let element;
            if (type === 'id') {
                element = document.getElementById(value);
            } else if (type === 'class') {
                element = document.querySelector(`.`);
            }
            if (element) {
                element.focus();
                console.log(`Focus state restored:  `);
            }
        } catch (e) {
            console.warn('Failed to restore focus state', e);
        }
    }
}

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            const isChatOpen = sessionStorage.getItem('isChatOpen') === 'true';
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log(`Page loaded. isChatOpen = , selectedLanguage = `);
			
			// Restore focus state
                restoreFocusState();

            // If the chat was open before the page refresh, disable the dropdown
            if (isChatOpen) {
                console.log("Chat was open before refresh. Disabling dropdown...");
                waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                    const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                    if (languageDropdown) {
                        languageDropdown.disabled = true; // Disable dropdown
                        console.log("languageDropdown is ", languageDropdown);
                        const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                        dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Set language to selected Language.
                        console.log("Language code is ", selectedLanguage);
                    }
                });
            }

            // Select the df-messenger-chat-bubble element
            waitForElement("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                // Access its Shadow DOM
                const shadowRoot = chatBubble.shadowRoot;

                // Create the tooltip element
                const tooltip = document.createElement("div");
                tooltip.className = "language-tooltip";
                tooltip.innerHTML = `
                    <h6>
                        <span>Language</span>
                        <div class="language-dropdown">
                            <select onchange="changeLanguage(this)">
                                <option value="en">English</option>
                                <option value="es">Español</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                    </h6>
                `;

                // Append the tooltip to the title bar
                const titleBar = shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title");
                if (titleBar) {
                    titleBar.appendChild(tooltip);
                }

                // Check if the dropdown should be disabled
                const languageDropdown = shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                if (sessionStorage.getItem('isDropdownDisabled') === 'true') {
                    languageDropdown.disabled = true;
                }
                // Set the dropdown to the selected language
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;

                // Set the language for the text area
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
            });
        });

        // Function to change the language
        function changeLanguage(selectElement) {
            const languageCode = selectElement.value;
            const languageName = selectElement.options[selectElement.selectedIndex].text;

            // Update the chatbot's language
            const dfMessenger = document.querySelector("df-messenger");
            dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", languageCode);

            // Disable the dropdown after selection
            waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                if (languageDropdown) {
                    languageDropdown.disabled = true; // Disable dropdown
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isDropdownDisabled', 'true'); // Store the state in sessionStorage
                    sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', languageCode); // Store the selected language in sessionStorage
                    console.log("Language dropdown disabled after selection inside Language Change");
                }
            });

            if (langselcnt === 'first') {
                dfMessenger.sendRequest('event', 'auto_welcome_message');
                langselcnt = 'changed';
            }
        }

            // Update the tooltip text
            const tooltipSpan = document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector(".language-tooltip span");
    
        document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.title-text > h2")
       .outerHTML = '<h4>' + document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble")
       .shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar")
       .shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.title-text > h2").innerHTML + '</h4>';

      // Event listeners
      window.addEventListener('df-chat-open-changed', (event) => {
            const isOpen = event.detail.isOpen;
            console.log(`df-chat-open-changed: isOpen = `);
            const selectedLanguage = getBrowserLanguage();
			sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', selectedLanguage); 
			updateChatState(isOpen); // Update chat state in sessionStorage
            if (isOpen) {
                // Enable the language dropdown when the chat is opened
                waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                    const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                  //  const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
                    console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                  /*  if(selectedLanguage){
                        languageDropdown.disabled = true; 
                        console.log('languageDropdown is in event.detail.isOpen if selectedLanguage state:', selectedLanguage);
                    }*/
                    console.log('languageDropdown is in event.detail.isOpen if state:', languageDropdown);
                    if (languageDropdown && isFirstOpen) {
                        languageDropdown.disabled = false;
                        languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                        isFirstOpen = false;
                    }
                    const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                    dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
                    dfMessenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: false });
                    dfMessenger.sendRequest('event', 'auto_welcome_message');
                    console.log(`in IF Chat is closed`);
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = false;
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = "";
                    const chatBubbleEl = document.querySelector('df-messenger-chat-bubble');
                    const buttonEl = chatBubbleEl.shadowRoot.querySelector('div > .close-button');
                });
            } else {
                console.log(`in Else Chat is closed`);
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = "";
                sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', selectedLanguage); // Reset the selected language to English
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
                langselcnt = 'first';
               // selectedLanguage = 'en';
                isFirstOpen = true;
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-chip-clicked', (event) => {
            console.log("df-chip-clicked->" + event.detail.querySelector);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in Chip clicked:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage')|| getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage || languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
               // const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
           // const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
        });
        window.addEventListener('df-user-input-entered', (event) => {
            console.log(event.detail.input);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in user Input:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage || languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
             //   const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || 'en';
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-button-clicked', (actionLink) => {
            console.log(actionLink);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in button actionLink:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage')|| getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage||languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
                //const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || 'en';
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-session-ended', () => {
            const messenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage');
            if (selectedLanguage === 'es') {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Sesión completa*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            } else {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Session complete*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            }
            messenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').value = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = true;
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = '2px solid var(--df-messenger-focus-color, var(--df-messenger-default-focus-color))';
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-session-expired', () => {
            const messenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage');
            if (selectedLanguage === 'es') {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Sesión caducada, cierre el chat y vuelva a abrirlo*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            } else {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Session expired please close the chat and reopen*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            }
            messenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').value = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = true;
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = '2px solid var(--df-messenger-focus-color, var(--df-messenger-default-focus-color))';
        });
        // Store focus state on click and keypress
        document.addEventListener('click', storeFocusState);
        document.addEventListener('keypress', storeFocusState);
  </script>

<style>
    /* Styles for the language tooltip */
    .language-tooltip {
      position: absolute;
      top: 10px;
      right: 60px; /* Position before the close button */
      background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
      color: white;
      padding: 5px 10px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      font-size: 12px;
      z-index: 1000;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
    }

    .language-tooltip:hover {
      background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
    }



    .language-dropdown {
      display: none;
      position: absolute;
      top: 100%;
      right: 0;
      background-color: white;
      border: 1px solid #ccc;
      border-radius: 4px;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
      z-index: 1000;
    }

    .language-dropdown button {
      display: block;
      width: 100%;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      background-color: white;
      border: none;
      text-align: left;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .language-dropdown button:hover {
      background-color: #f0f0f0;
    }

    .language-tooltip:hover .language-dropdown {
      display: block;
    }

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
    let timers = [];

    // Multilingual stages with absolute times (since last activity)
    const stages = [
      {
        time: 5 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "I haven’t heard from you in a while. Would you like to continue?",
          es: "Hace tiempo que no sé de ti. ¿Quieres continuar?"
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_5MIN"
      },
      {
        time: 15 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "This session will remain open for a few more minutes. Please respond if you’d like to continue.",
          es: "Esta sesión permanecerá abierta unos minutos más. Por favor responde si deseas continuar."
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_15MIN"
      }
    ];

    function getCurrentLang() {
      return dfMessenger.getAttribute("language-code") || "en";
    }

    function scheduleTimers() {
      // Clear any existing timers
      timers.forEach(t => clearTimeout(t));
      timers = [];

      const lang = getCurrentLang();

      // Schedule all stages relative to now
      stages.forEach(stage => {
        const t = setTimeout(() => {
          const message = stage.messages[lang] || stage.messages["en"];
          console.log(`Stage  (lang=)`);

          dfMessenger.renderCustomText(message);
          dfMessenger.sendRequest({ event: stage.event });
        }, stage.time);

        timers.push(t);
      });
    }

    function resetInactivity() {
      console.log("Reset inactivity + reschedule all timers");
      scheduleTimers();
    }

    // Reset on user or bot activity
    window.addEventListener("df-request-sent", resetInactivity);
    window.addEventListener("df-response-received", resetInactivity);

    // Watch language changes
    const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {
      mutations.forEach(mutation => {
        if (mutation.attributeName === "language-code") {
          console.log("Language changed to:", getCurrentLang());
        }
      });
    });
    observer.observe(dfMessenger, { attributes: true });

    // Start timers at load
    scheduleTimers();
  });
</script>
