<div class="tsg-rwd-text parbase section">

<div style="margin-top:5px">

     
    <p></p><p><b>Visit our <a title="U.S. Visas News" adhocenable="false" href="/content/travel/en/News/visas-news.html">Newsroom</a> for information about the current status of visa services and visa restrictions.</b></p>
<hr>

<p></p>

</div></div>
<div class="tsg-rwd-text parbase section">

<div style="margin-top:5px">

    <h3 id="tsg-rwd-text"> What is a U.S. Visa?</h3>
    <p></p><p>A citizen of a foreign country who seeks to travel to the United States generally must first obtain a U.S. visa. Visas are placed in the traveler’s passport, a travel document issued by the traveler’s country of citizenship.</p>
<p>Certain international travelers may be eligible to travel to the United States without a visa if they meet the requirements for visa-free travel. The visa section of this website contains information on U.S. visas for foreign citizens seeking to travel to the United States.</p>
<p>(Note: U.S. citizens don’t need a U.S. visa for travel, but when planning travel abroad may need a visa issued by the country they wish to visit. When planning travel abroad, learn about visa requirements by country, on the <a href="/content/travel/en/international-travel/International-Travel-Country-Information-Pages.html" title="International Travel - Country Information" adhocenable="false">country information</a> page of the International Travel Section of this website).</p>
<p><a href="/content/travel/en/us-visas/visa-information-resources/frequently-asked-questions/what-is-us-visa.html">More Information about Visas</a></p>
<p></p>

</div></div>
<div class="tsg-rwd-text parbase section">

<div style="margin-top:5px">

    <h3 id="tsg-rwd-text"> Find out what visa type is appropriate for you</h3>
    <p></p><p>The type of visa you must obtain is defined by U.S. immigration law, and relates to the purpose of your travel. </p>
<p>Please visit our <a title="Visa Wizard" href="/content/travel/en/us-visas/visa-information-resources/wizard.html">Visa Wizard</a><b> </b>to find out what visa type is appropriate for you.  We have a complete list of <a title="Visa Categories" href="/content/travel/en/us-visas/visa-information-resources/all-visa-categories.html">Visa Categories</a> on this website along with a <a href="/content/travel/en/us-visas/visa-information-resources/glossary.html" title="Visa - Glossary" adhocenable="false">helpful glossary of terms</a> used in the application process.  </p>
<p>You can also visit our <a title="Frequently Asked Questions" href="/content/travel/en/us-visas/visa-information-resources/frequently-asked-questions/about-basics.html">Frequently Asked Questions</a>,<b> </b>or find information about the <a title="Visa Waiver Program" href="/content/travel/en/us-visas/tourism-visit/visa-waiver-program.html">Visa Waiver Program</a>.</p>
<p></p>

</div></div>
<div class="ImportantNotifications parbase section">


      


<div class="tsg-rwd-ImportantNotifications tsg_rwd_ImportantNotifications_single" id="noticeID_1">

    <div class="tsg-rwd-ImportantNotifications-header standard infoheader">    
        <div class="none"></div> <div class="iconheader">  <h3>Where to Apply for a U.S. Visa</h3></div>
    </div>

    <div class="tsg-rwd-ImportantNotifications-caption">

        <p><b>Effective November 1, 2025</b>, all immigrant visa applicants will be scheduled for their interview in the consular district designated for their country of residence or alternatively, may apply in their country of nationality if requested, with limited exceptions. </p>
<p><b>Effective September 6, 2025</b>, all nonimmigrant visa applicants should schedule their interview at the U.S. embassy or consulate in their country of residence or nationality.</p>
<p>Find a <a href="http://www.usembassy.gov/" target="_blank" title="usembassy.gov" adhocenable="false">U.S. Embassy or Consulate</a> that processes visas in your country of nationality or residence.</p>
<p>Nationals of countries where the U.S. government is not conducting routine visa operations must apply at the designated embassy or consulate, unless their residence is elsewhere. Please see the list of <a href="/content/travel/en/News/visas-news/adjudicating-niv-applicants-in-their-country-of-residence.html" title="Adjudicating Nonimmigrant Visa Applicants in Their Country of Residence - September 6, 2025">Designated Nonimmigrant Visa Locations</a> and <a title="Adjudicating Immigrant Visa Applicants in Their Country of Residence - August 28, 2025" href="/content/travel/en/News/visas-news/adjudicating-iv-applicants-in-their-country-of-residence.html">Designated Immigrant Visa Locations</a> for visa processing.</p>



    </div>
</div></div>

gold_text:
What is a U.S. Visa?

A citizen of a foreign country who seeks to travel to the United States generally must first obtain a U.S. visa. Visas are placed in the traveler’s passport, a travel document issued by the traveler’s country of citizenship.

Certain international travelers may be eligible to travel to the United States without a visa if they meet the requirements for visa-free travel. The visa section of this website contains information on U.S. visas for foreign citizens seeking to travel to the United States.

(Note: U.S. citizens don’t need a U.S. visa for travel, but when planning travel abroad may need a visa issued by the country they wish to visit. When planning travel abroad, learn about visa requirements by country, on the country information page of the International Travel Section of this website).

More Information about Visas

Find out what visa type is appropriate for you

The type of visa you must obtain is defined by U.S. immigration law, and relates to the purpose of your travel. 

Please visit our Visa Wizard to find out what visa type is appropriate for you.  We have a complete list of Visa Categories on this website along with a helpful glossary of terms used in the application process.  

You can also visit our Frequently Asked Questions, or find information about the Visa Waiver Program.

Where to Apply for a U.S. Visa

Effective November 1, 2025, all immigrant visa applicants will be scheduled for their interview in the consular district designated for their country of residence or alternatively, may apply in their country of nationality if requested, with limited exceptions. 

Effective September 6, 2025, all nonimmigrant visa applicants should schedule their interview at the U.S. embassy or consulate in their country of residence or nationality.

Find a U.S. Embassy or Consulate that processes visas in your country of nationality or residence.

Nationals of countries where the U.S. government is not conducting routine visa operations must apply at the designated embassy or consulate, unless their residence is elsewhere. Please see the list of Designated Nonimmigrant Visa Locations and Designated Immigrant Visa Locations for visa processing.

  <script src="https://cloud.google.com/ai/gen-app-builder/client?hl=en_US"></script><script src="https://www.gstatic.com/_/mss/boq-cloud-ai-ucs/_/js/k=boq-cloud-ai-ucs.UcsWidgetUi.en_US.I9T4Ig27qLo.2021.O/am=AABO/d=1/rs=AAj4NmyVUH6zThvp2uAlileIslTgRDNtOQ/m=bootstrap_module,ucs_widget_module,xlite_module" async=""></script>

  <!-- Chatbot -->
  </head><body><df-messenger location="us-central1" project-id="se-gcp-348466" agent-id="d7ae98af-e734-4ad5-bd74-83d923a164ce" language-code="en" max-query-length="-1">
    <df-messenger-chat-bubble chat-collapse-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/south_east_24dp.svg" chat-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/TSG_Chatbot_48x48_v1-01-01.svg" chat-title-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/TSG_Chatbot_48x48_v1-01-01.svg" chat-title="Virtual Assistant">
    </df-messenger-chat-bubble>
  </df-messenger>

  <script>
        // Wait for DOM load
        let langselcnt = 'first';
        let isFirstOpen = true; // Flag to track first chat open

        // Track chat state in sessionStorage
        function updateChatState(isOpen) {
            sessionStorage.setItem('isChatOpen', isOpen);
            console.log(`Chat state updated: isOpen = `);
        }

        // Function to wait for an element to be available
        function waitForElement(selector, callback) {
            const element = document.querySelector(selector);
            if (element) {
                callback(element);
            } else {
                setTimeout(() => waitForElement(selector, callback), 100);
            }
        }

          // Function to get the language of the browser
            function getBrowserLanguage() {
            //const lang = navigator.language || navigator.userLanguage;
			 const lang = document.documentElement.lang;
             console.log(`Detected browser language: `);
              if (lang.startsWith('es')) {
                     return 'es';
                } else {
                    return 'en';
         }
        }

                // Function to store focus state
                function storeFocusState() {
            const activeElement = document.activeElement;
            if (activeElement) {
                sessionStorage.setItem('focusedElement', activeElement.id || activeElement.className);
                console.log(`Focus state stored: false`);
            }
        }

        // Function to restore focus state
function restoreFocusState() {
    const focusedData = sessionStorage.getItem('focusedElement');
    if (focusedData) {
        try {
            const {type, value} = JSON.parse(focusedData);
            let element;
            if (type === 'id') {
                element = document.getElementById(value);
            } else if (type === 'class') {
                element = document.querySelector(`.`);
            }
            if (element) {
                element.focus();
                console.log(`Focus state restored:  `);
            }
        } catch (e) {
            console.warn('Failed to restore focus state', e);
        }
    }
}

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            const isChatOpen = sessionStorage.getItem('isChatOpen') === 'true';
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log(`Page loaded. isChatOpen = , selectedLanguage = `);
			
			// Restore focus state
                restoreFocusState();

            // If the chat was open before the page refresh, disable the dropdown
            if (isChatOpen) {
                console.log("Chat was open before refresh. Disabling dropdown...");
                waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                    const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                    if (languageDropdown) {
                        languageDropdown.disabled = true; // Disable dropdown
                        console.log("languageDropdown is ", languageDropdown);
                        const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                        dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Set language to selected Language.
                        console.log("Language code is ", selectedLanguage);
                    }
                });
            }

            // Select the df-messenger-chat-bubble element
            waitForElement("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                // Access its Shadow DOM
                const shadowRoot = chatBubble.shadowRoot;

                // Create the tooltip element
                const tooltip = document.createElement("div");
                tooltip.className = "language-tooltip";
                tooltip.innerHTML = `
                    <h6>
                        <span>Language</span>
                        <div class="language-dropdown">
                            <select onchange="changeLanguage(this)">
                                <option value="en">English</option>
                                <option value="es">Español</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                    </h6>
                `;

                // Append the tooltip to the title bar
                const titleBar = shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title");
                if (titleBar) {
                    titleBar.appendChild(tooltip);
                }

                // Check if the dropdown should be disabled
                const languageDropdown = shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                if (sessionStorage.getItem('isDropdownDisabled') === 'true') {
                    languageDropdown.disabled = true;
                }
                // Set the dropdown to the selected language
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;

                // Set the language for the text area
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
            });
        });

        // Function to change the language
        function changeLanguage(selectElement) {
            const languageCode = selectElement.value;
            const languageName = selectElement.options[selectElement.selectedIndex].text;

            // Update the chatbot's language
            const dfMessenger = document.querySelector("df-messenger");
            dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", languageCode);

            // Disable the dropdown after selection
            waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                if (languageDropdown) {
                    languageDropdown.disabled = true; // Disable dropdown
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isDropdownDisabled', 'true'); // Store the state in sessionStorage
                    sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', languageCode); // Store the selected language in sessionStorage
                    console.log("Language dropdown disabled after selection inside Language Change");
                }
            });

            if (langselcnt === 'first') {
                dfMessenger.sendRequest('event', 'auto_welcome_message');
                langselcnt = 'changed';
            }
        }

            // Update the tooltip text
            const tooltipSpan = document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector(".language-tooltip span");
    
        document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.title-text > h2")
       .outerHTML = '<h4>' + document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble")
       .shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar")
       .shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.title-text > h2").innerHTML + '</h4>';

      // Event listeners
      window.addEventListener('df-chat-open-changed', (event) => {
            const isOpen = event.detail.isOpen;
            console.log(`df-chat-open-changed: isOpen = `);
            const selectedLanguage = getBrowserLanguage();
			sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', selectedLanguage); 
			updateChatState(isOpen); // Update chat state in sessionStorage
            if (isOpen) {
                // Enable the language dropdown when the chat is opened
                waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                    const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                  //  const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
                    console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                  /*  if(selectedLanguage){
                        languageDropdown.disabled = true; 
                        console.log('languageDropdown is in event.detail.isOpen if selectedLanguage state:', selectedLanguage);
                    }*/
                    console.log('languageDropdown is in event.detail.isOpen if state:', languageDropdown);
                    if (languageDropdown && isFirstOpen) {
                        languageDropdown.disabled = false;
                        languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                        isFirstOpen = false;
                    }
                    const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                    dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
                    dfMessenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: false });
                    dfMessenger.sendRequest('event', 'auto_welcome_message');
                    console.log(`in IF Chat is closed`);
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = false;
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = "";
                    const chatBubbleEl = document.querySelector('df-messenger-chat-bubble');
                    const buttonEl = chatBubbleEl.shadowRoot.querySelector('div > .close-button');
                });
            } else {
                console.log(`in Else Chat is closed`);
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = "";
                sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', selectedLanguage); // Reset the selected language to English
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
                langselcnt = 'first';
               // selectedLanguage = 'en';
                isFirstOpen = true;
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-chip-clicked', (event) => {
            console.log("df-chip-clicked->" + event.detail.querySelector);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in Chip clicked:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage')|| getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage || languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
               // const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
           // const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
        });
        window.addEventListener('df-user-input-entered', (event) => {
            console.log(event.detail.input);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in user Input:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage || languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
             //   const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || 'en';
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-button-clicked', (actionLink) => {
            console.log(actionLink);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in button actionLink:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage')|| getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage||languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
                //const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || 'en';
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-session-ended', () => {
            const messenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage');
            if (selectedLanguage === 'es') {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Sesión completa*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            } else {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Session complete*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            }
            messenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').value = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = true;
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = '2px solid var(--df-messenger-focus-color, var(--df-messenger-default-focus-color))';
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-session-expired', () => {
            const messenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage');
            if (selectedLanguage === 'es') {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Sesión caducada, cierre el chat y vuelva a abrirlo*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            } else {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Session expired please close the chat and reopen*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            }
            messenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').value = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = true;
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = '2px solid var(--df-messenger-focus-color, var(--df-messenger-default-focus-color))';
        });
        // Store focus state on click and keypress
        document.addEventListener('click', storeFocusState);
        document.addEventListener('keypress', storeFocusState);
  </script>

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
    let timers = [];

    // Multilingual stages with absolute times (since last activity)
    const stages = [
      {
        time: 5 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "I haven’t heard from you in a while. Would you like to continue?",
          es: "Hace tiempo que no sé de ti. ¿Quieres continuar?"
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_5MIN"
      },
      {
        time: 15 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "This session will remain open for a few more minutes. Please respond if you’d like to continue.",
          es: "Esta sesión permanecerá abierta unos minutos más. Por favor responde si deseas continuar."
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_15MIN"
      }
    ];

    function getCurrentLang() {
      return dfMessenger.getAttribute("language-code") || "en";
    }

    function scheduleTimers() {
      // Clear any existing timers
      timers.forEach(t => clearTimeout(t));
      timers = [];

      const lang = getCurrentLang();

      // Schedule all stages relative to now
      stages.forEach(stage => {
        const t = setTimeout(() => {
          const message = stage.messages[lang] || stage.messages["en"];
          console.log(`Stage  (lang=)`);

          dfMessenger.renderCustomText(message);
          dfMessenger.sendRequest({ event: stage.event });
        }, stage.time);

        timers.push(t);
      });
    }

    function resetInactivity() {
      console.log("Reset inactivity + reschedule all timers");
      scheduleTimers();
    }

    // Reset on user or bot activity
    window.addEventListener("df-request-sent", resetInactivity);
    window.addEventListener("df-response-received", resetInactivity);

    // Watch language changes
    const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {
      mutations.forEach(mutation => {
        if (mutation.attributeName === "language-code") {
          console.log("Language changed to:", getCurrentLang());
        }
      });
    });
    observer.observe(dfMessenger, { attributes: true });

    // Start timers at load
    scheduleTimers();
  });
</script>

            <div class="tsg-rwd-page-subheader">

                <h1>U.S. Visa Law & Policy</h1>
            </div>
            <div class="tsg-rwd-content-page-parsysxxx parsys"><div class="tsg-rwd-text parbase section">

<div style="margin-top:5px">

     
    <p></p><p>United States laws enacted by Congress, including those in the Immigration and Nationality Act (INA), govern matters related to processing and issuance of visas and travel to the United States, including entry and exit of all travelers across the nation’s borders.  </p>
<hr>

<hr>

<hr>

<p></p>

</div></div>
<div class="tsg-rwd-text parbase section">

<div style="margin-top:5px">

     
    <p></p><h2><a href="/content/travel/en/legal/visa-law0/visa-bulletin.html" adhocenable="false">Visa Bulletin</a></h2>
<p>The Visa Bulletin provides information regarding the cut-off dates which govern immigrant visa availability in numerically limited categories and other immigrant visa-related information. </p>
<hr>

<p></p>

</div></div>
<div class="tsg-rwd-text parbase section">

<div style="margin-top:5px">

     
    <p></p><h2><a href="/content/travel/en/legal/visa-law0/visa-statistics.html" adhocenable="false">Visa Statistics</a></h2>
<p>Find the Annual Report of the Visa Office and other immigrant and nonimmigrant visa issuance statistics. </p>
<hr>

<p></p>

</div></div>
<div class="tsg-rwd-text parbase section">

<div style="margin-top:5px">

     
    <p></p><h2><a href="/content/travel/en/legal/visa-law0/laws-regulations.html" adhocenable="false">Laws and Regulations</a></h2>
<p>This section provides links to laws, regulations, and guidance on immigration and visa-related matters.</p>
<hr>

<p></p>

</div></div>
</div>

gold_text:
U.S. Visa Law & Policy

United States laws enacted by Congress, including those in the Immigration and Nationality Act (INA), govern matters related to processing and issuance of visas and travel to the United States, including entry and exit of all travelers across the nation’s borders.  

Visa Bulletin

The Visa Bulletin provides information regarding the cut-off dates which govern immigrant visa availability in numerically limited categories and other immigrant visa-related information. 

Visa Statistics

Find the Annual Report of the Visa Office and other immigrant and nonimmigrant visa issuance statistics. 

Laws and Regulations

This section provides links to laws, regulations, and guidance on immigration and visa-related matters.

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
   <!-- Widget JavaScript bundle -->
  <script src="https://cloud.google.com/ai/gen-app-builder/client?hl=en_US"></script><script src="https://www.gstatic.com/_/mss/boq-cloud-ai-ucs/_/js/k=boq-cloud-ai-ucs.UcsWidgetUi.en_US.I9T4Ig27qLo.2021.O/am=AABO/d=1/rs=AAj4NmyVUH6zThvp2uAlileIslTgRDNtOQ/m=bootstrap_module,ucs_widget_module,xlite_module" async=""></script>

  <!-- Chatbot -->
  </head><body><df-messenger location="us-central1" project-id="se-gcp-348466" agent-id="d7ae98af-e734-4ad5-bd74-83d923a164ce" language-code="en" max-query-length="-1">
    <df-messenger-chat-bubble chat-collapse-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/south_east_24dp.svg" chat-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/TSG_Chatbot_48x48_v1-01-01.svg" chat-title-icon="https://travel.state.gov/content/dam/resources/TSG_Chatbot_48x48_v1-01-01.svg" chat-title="Virtual Assistant">
    </df-messenger-chat-bubble>
  </df-messenger>

  <script>
        // Wait for DOM load
        let langselcnt = 'first';
        let isFirstOpen = true; // Flag to track first chat open

        // Track chat state in sessionStorage
        function updateChatState(isOpen) {
            sessionStorage.setItem('isChatOpen', isOpen);
            console.log(`Chat state updated: isOpen = `);
        }

        // Function to wait for an element to be available
        function waitForElement(selector, callback) {
            const element = document.querySelector(selector);
            if (element) {
                callback(element);
            } else {
                setTimeout(() => waitForElement(selector, callback), 100);
            }
        }

          // Function to get the language of the browser
            function getBrowserLanguage() {
            //const lang = navigator.language || navigator.userLanguage;
			 const lang = document.documentElement.lang;
             console.log(`Detected browser language: `);
              if (lang.startsWith('es')) {
                     return 'es';
                } else {
                    return 'en';
         }
        }

                // Function to store focus state
                function storeFocusState() {
            const activeElement = document.activeElement;
            if (activeElement) {
                sessionStorage.setItem('focusedElement', activeElement.id || activeElement.className);
                console.log(`Focus state stored: false`);
            }
        }

        // Function to restore focus state
function restoreFocusState() {
    const focusedData = sessionStorage.getItem('focusedElement');
    if (focusedData) {
        try {
            const {type, value} = JSON.parse(focusedData);
            let element;
            if (type === 'id') {
                element = document.getElementById(value);
            } else if (type === 'class') {
                element = document.querySelector(`.`);
            }
            if (element) {
                element.focus();
                console.log(`Focus state restored:  `);
            }
        } catch (e) {
            console.warn('Failed to restore focus state', e);
        }
    }
}

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            const isChatOpen = sessionStorage.getItem('isChatOpen') === 'true';
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log(`Page loaded. isChatOpen = , selectedLanguage = `);
			
			// Restore focus state
                restoreFocusState();

            // If the chat was open before the page refresh, disable the dropdown
            if (isChatOpen) {
                console.log("Chat was open before refresh. Disabling dropdown...");
                waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                    const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                    if (languageDropdown) {
                        languageDropdown.disabled = true; // Disable dropdown
                        console.log("languageDropdown is ", languageDropdown);
                        const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                        dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Set language to selected Language.
                        console.log("Language code is ", selectedLanguage);
                    }
                });
            }

            // Select the df-messenger-chat-bubble element
            waitForElement("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                // Access its Shadow DOM
                const shadowRoot = chatBubble.shadowRoot;

                // Create the tooltip element
                const tooltip = document.createElement("div");
                tooltip.className = "language-tooltip";
                tooltip.innerHTML = `
                    <h6>
                        <span>Language</span>
                        <div class="language-dropdown">
                            <select onchange="changeLanguage(this)">
                                <option value="en">English</option>
                                <option value="es">Español</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                    </h6>
                `;

                // Append the tooltip to the title bar
                const titleBar = shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title");
                if (titleBar) {
                    titleBar.appendChild(tooltip);
                }

                // Check if the dropdown should be disabled
                const languageDropdown = shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                if (sessionStorage.getItem('isDropdownDisabled') === 'true') {
                    languageDropdown.disabled = true;
                }
                // Set the dropdown to the selected language
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;

                // Set the language for the text area
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
            });
        });

        // Function to change the language
        function changeLanguage(selectElement) {
            const languageCode = selectElement.value;
            const languageName = selectElement.options[selectElement.selectedIndex].text;

            // Update the chatbot's language
            const dfMessenger = document.querySelector("df-messenger");
            dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", languageCode);

            // Disable the dropdown after selection
            waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                if (languageDropdown) {
                    languageDropdown.disabled = true; // Disable dropdown
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isDropdownDisabled', 'true'); // Store the state in sessionStorage
                    sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', languageCode); // Store the selected language in sessionStorage
                    console.log("Language dropdown disabled after selection inside Language Change");
                }
            });

            if (langselcnt === 'first') {
                dfMessenger.sendRequest('event', 'auto_welcome_message');
                langselcnt = 'changed';
            }
        }

            // Update the tooltip text
            const tooltipSpan = document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector(".language-tooltip span");
    
        document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.title-text > h2")
       .outerHTML = '<h4>' + document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble")
       .shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar")
       .shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.title-text > h2").innerHTML + '</h4>';

      // Event listeners
      window.addEventListener('df-chat-open-changed', (event) => {
            const isOpen = event.detail.isOpen;
            console.log(`df-chat-open-changed: isOpen = `);
            const selectedLanguage = getBrowserLanguage();
			sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', selectedLanguage); 
			updateChatState(isOpen); // Update chat state in sessionStorage
            if (isOpen) {
                // Enable the language dropdown when the chat is opened
                waitForElement("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble", (chatBubble) => {
                    const languageDropdown = chatBubble.shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
                  //  const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
                    console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                  /*  if(selectedLanguage){
                        languageDropdown.disabled = true; 
                        console.log('languageDropdown is in event.detail.isOpen if selectedLanguage state:', selectedLanguage);
                    }*/
                    console.log('languageDropdown is in event.detail.isOpen if state:', languageDropdown);
                    if (languageDropdown && isFirstOpen) {
                        languageDropdown.disabled = false;
                        languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                        isFirstOpen = false;
                    }
                    const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                    dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
                    dfMessenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: false });
                    dfMessenger.sendRequest('event', 'auto_welcome_message');
                    console.log(`in IF Chat is closed`);
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = false;
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
                    document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = "";
                    const chatBubbleEl = document.querySelector('df-messenger-chat-bubble');
                    const buttonEl = chatBubbleEl.shadowRoot.querySelector('div > .close-button');
                });
            } else {
                console.log(`in Else Chat is closed`);
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
                document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = "";
                sessionStorage.setItem('selectedLanguage', selectedLanguage); // Reset the selected language to English
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage);
                langselcnt = 'first';
               // selectedLanguage = 'en';
                isFirstOpen = true;
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-chip-clicked', (event) => {
            console.log("df-chip-clicked->" + event.detail.querySelector);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in Chip clicked:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage')|| getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage || languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
               // const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
           // const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
        });
        window.addEventListener('df-user-input-entered', (event) => {
            console.log(event.detail.input);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in user Input:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage || languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
             //   const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || 'en';
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-button-clicked', (actionLink) => {
            console.log(actionLink);
            const languageDropdown = document.querySelector("body > df-messenger > df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector("#df-chat-wrapper > df-messenger-titlebar").shadowRoot.querySelector("#titlebar-title > div.language-tooltip > h6 > div > select");
            console.log('languageDropdown is in button actionLink:', languageDropdown);
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage')|| getBrowserLanguage();
            console.log('getBrowserLang is in Chip clicked:', selectedLanguage);
            if (selectedLanguage||languageDropdown) {
                languageDropdown.disabled = true;
                //const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage') || 'en';
                console.log("selected Lang=>" + selectedLanguage);
                languageDropdown.value = selectedLanguage;
                const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
                dfMessenger.setAttribute("language-code", selectedLanguage); // Ensure the language is set correctly
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-session-ended', () => {
            const messenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage');
            if (selectedLanguage === 'es') {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Sesión completa*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            } else {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Session complete*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            }
            messenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').value = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = true;
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = '2px solid var(--df-messenger-focus-color, var(--df-messenger-default-focus-color))';
        });

        window.addEventListener('df-session-expired', () => {
            const messenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
            const selectedLanguage = sessionStorage.getItem('selectedLanguage');
            if (selectedLanguage === 'es') {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Sesión caducada, cierre el chat y vuelva a abrirlo*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            } else {
                messenger.renderCustomText(`*Session expired please close the chat and reopen*`, /* isBot= */ true);
            }
            messenger.startNewSession({ retainHistory: true });
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').value = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-chat').shadowRoot.querySelector('df-messenger-user-input').shadowRoot.querySelector('textarea').disabled = true;
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').focus();
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.outline = "";
            document.querySelector("df-messenger df-messenger-chat-bubble").shadowRoot.querySelector('.bubble').style.border = '2px solid var(--df-messenger-focus-color, var(--df-messenger-default-focus-color))';
        });
        // Store focus state on click and keypress
        document.addEventListener('click', storeFocusState);
        document.addEventListener('keypress', storeFocusState);
  </script>

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
    let timers = [];

    // Multilingual stages with absolute times (since last activity)
    const stages = [
      {
        time: 5 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "I haven’t heard from you in a while. Would you like to continue?",
          es: "Hace tiempo que no sé de ti. ¿Quieres continuar?"
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_5MIN"
      },
      {
        time: 15 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "This session will remain open for a few more minutes. Please respond if you’d like to continue.",
          es: "Esta sesión permanecerá abierta unos minutos más. Por favor responde si deseas continuar."
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_15MIN"
      }
    ];

    function getCurrentLang() {
      return dfMessenger.getAttribute("language-code") || "en";
    }

    function scheduleTimers() {
      // Clear any existing timers
      timers.forEach(t => clearTimeout(t));
      timers = [];

      const lang = getCurrentLang();

      // Schedule all stages relative to now
      stages.forEach(stage => {
        const t = setTimeout(() => {
          const message = stage.messages[lang] || stage.messages["en"];
          console.log(`Stage  (lang=)`);

          dfMessenger.renderCustomText(message);
          dfMessenger.sendRequest({ event: stage.event });
        }, stage.time);

        timers.push(t);
      });
    }

    function resetInactivity() {
      console.log("Reset inactivity + reschedule all timers");
      scheduleTimers();
    }

    // Reset on user or bot activity
    window.addEventListener("df-request-sent", resetInactivity);
    window.addEventListener("df-response-received", resetInactivity);

    // Watch language changes
    const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {
      mutations.forEach(mutation => {
        if (mutation.attributeName === "language-code") {
          console.log("Language changed to:", getCurrentLang());
        }
      });
    });
    observer.observe(dfMessenger, { attributes: true });

    // Start timers at load
    scheduleTimers();
  });
</script>

    <div class="tsg-rwd-main-copy-frame ">
        <div class="tsg-rwd-main-copy-body-frame withrail">
            <div class="tsg-rwd-page-subheader">
                <a name="inner-content" id="inner-content" href="javascript:void(0);" title="start of main content"></a>
                <h1>How to Request a Copy of a Panama Canal Zone Record</h1>
            </div>
            <div class="tsg-rwd-content-page-parsysxxx parsys"><div class="tsg-rwd-text parbase section">

<div style="margin-top:5px">

     
    <p></p><p>We issue copies of birth and death records from the Panama Canal Zone that were issued between 1904 and 1979.</p>
<p>You can request a copy of these records if you are:</p>
<ul>
<li>The individual listed on the document, </li>
<li>A legal guardian of the individual listed on the document,</li>
<li>An authorized government agency, or</li>
<li>A person who has written permission from the individual listed on the document.</li>
</ul>
<p>The Panama Canal Commission kept the birth records of persons born in the Panama Canal Zone between 1904 and 1979. In December 1999, the Commission gave the records to the U.S. Department of State.</p>
<p>People born in the former Panama Canal Zone did not automatically get U.S. citizenship at birth. In addition to a Panama Canal Zone birth certificate, U.S. passport applicants must submit evidence of their parents U.S. citizenship to prove their claim to U.S. citizenship.</p>
<p></p>

</div></div>
<div class="accordion parbase section">

<div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion">

    <a href="javascript:void(0);" title="Open all accordions" id="set_1" data-category="TSG_Accordions" data-action="Steps to request the copy - Open all accordions" class="hideThis trackDAP tsg-rwd-accordion-All-control-tsg_rwd_show_all_button">ALL <span class="fa fa-plus"></span>/<span class="fa fa-minus"></span></a>
    <a href="javascript:void(0);" title="Close all accordions" id="set_1-sister" class="trackDAP tsg-rwd-accordion-All-control-sister" data-category="TSG_Accordions" data-action="Steps to request the copy - Close all accordions">ALL <span class="fa fa-plus"></span>/<span class="fa fa-minus"></span></a>

    <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header trackDAP" aria-expanded="false" title="Steps to request the copy" data-category="TSG_Accordions" data-action="Steps to request the copy" id="accNum0" aria-controls="accSect0"> 
      <h4 class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header-name-frame">
        Steps to request the copy 
        </h4>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-open"><span class="fa fa-plus-circle"></span></div>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-close"><span class="fa fa-minus-circle"></span></div>
    </a>
    <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-copy" role="region" id="accSect0" aria-labelledby="accNum0">
        <p>To request a copy, follow these steps:</p>
<p>1. Fill out a notarized, completed <a href="https://eforms.state.gov/Forms/ds5542.PDF" title="Form DS-5542 PDF" adhocenable="false" target="_blank">Form DS-5542<b></b></a></p>
<ul>
<li>Fill out the form on your computer</li>
<li>If you complete the form by hand, use black ink</li>
<li>Sign the form in front of a notary public to avoid delays</li>
</ul>
<p>2. Get a photocopy of the front and back of your valid photo ID<b>.</b> Examples include:</p>
<ul>
<li>State-issued driver’s license</li>
<li>Non-driver photo ID</li>
<li>Military ID</li>
<li>Passport</li>
<li>Prison or inmate ID</li>
</ul>
<p>If you don't have any of these IDs, please see <a href="/content/travel/en/replace-certify-docs/requesting-a-record/vital-records-ids.html" title="Passport Vital Records IDs">Passport Vital Records IDs</a>.</p>
<p>3<b>. </b>Get a check or money order. The cost is $50 for each record you request.<b></b></p>
<ul>
<li>Make payable to the "U.S. Department of State"</li>
<li>Include a complete mailing address on the check</li>
<li>Must be payable in U.S. dollars through a U.S. bank</li>
</ul>
<p>4. Mail <a href="https://eforms.state.gov/Forms/ds5542.PDF" title="Form DS-5542 PDF" adhocenable="false" target="_blank">Form DS-5542</a>, a photocopy of the ID, and payment to<b>:</b></p>
<p>    U.S. Department of State<br>
    Passport Vital Records Section<br>
    44132 Mercure Cir.<br>
    PO Box 1213<br>
    Sterling, VA  20166-1213</p>
<p>We can only provide official copies of records on file with the U.S. Department of State.</p>
<p><b>Processing Times</b></p>
<ul>
<li>Once we receive your request in our office, we should process it in <b>4 to 8 weeks</b>. </li>
<li>Some documents may take longer than 8 weeks to locate. We do not offer expedited service.</li>
<li>Mailing times (which may add up to 4 weeks) are not included in processing times.</li>
<li>To avoid delays, provide complete information on your Form DS-5542 and include all your supporting documents.</li>
</ul>
<p><b>Shipping</b></p>
<p>We will send your vital record to you. If you live in the United States, you can select First Class Mail or 1-3 Day Delivery:</p>
<ul>
<li>USPS First Class Mail: Takes one to two weeks. No extra charge. </li>
<li>1-3 Day Delivery Service: Add $22.05 to the check or money order. </li>
</ul>
<p>If you live outside the United States, we will send your vital record to the nearest U.S. embassy or consulate. The embassy or consulate will coordinate with you to pick up or deliver your record.</p>

        <div class="additional_component parsys"></div>
 
    </div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="accordion parbase section">

<div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion">

    <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header trackDAP" aria-expanded="false" title="Can I have someone else request my record?" data-category="TSG_Accordions" data-action="Can I have someone else request my record?" id="accNum1" aria-controls="accSect1"> 
      <h4 class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header-name-frame">
        Can I have someone else request my record? 
        </h4>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-open"><span class="fa fa-plus-circle"></span></div>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-close"><span class="fa fa-minus-circle"></span></div>
    </a>
    <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-copy" role="region" id="accSect1" aria-labelledby="accNum1">
        <p>Yes, you can give permission to a family member or friend who has known you for at least five years. We need:</p>
<ul>
<li>Your signed, written permission. For example: "I, [write your name], give permission to [write your friend or family member's name] to request my Panama Canal Zone record on my behalf."</li>
<li>A photocopy of your valid photo ID.</li>
<li>A notarized statement from the person who is requesting your records.</li>
<li>A photocopy of the front and back of the valid photo ID of the person making the request.</li>
</ul>

        <div class="additional_component parsys"></div>
 
    </div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="accordion parbase section">

<div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion">

    <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header trackDAP" aria-expanded="false" title="How to request an apostille on your document" data-category="TSG_Accordions" data-action="How to request an apostille on your document" id="accNum2" aria-controls="accSect2"> 
      <h4 class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header-name-frame">
        How to request an apostille on your document 
        </h4>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-open"><span class="fa fa-plus-circle"></span></div>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-close"><span class="fa fa-minus-circle"></span></div>
    </a>
    <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-copy" role="region" id="accSect2" aria-labelledby="accNum2">
        <p>An apostille certifies a document so countries in the <a href="#ExternalPopup" title="1961 Hague Convention link" class="ext_link" data-toggle="modal" data-url="https://www.hcch.net/en/instruments/conventions/status-table/?cid=41">1961 Hague Convention<span class="fa fa-external-link-alt ext_link"></span></a> will recognize it. </p>
<p>If you have a Panama Canal Zone record issued within the last five years, you don't need to pay for the apostille. If we issued your document more than five years ago, you must submit a request for a new Panama Canal Zone record.</p>
<p>If you need an apostille on your Panama Canal Zone record, you must submit a:</p>
<ol>
<li>Notarized, completed <a href="https://eforms.state.gov/Forms/ds5542.PDF" title="Form DS-5542 PDF" adhocenable="false" target="_blank">Form DS-5542</a></li>
<li>Photocopy of a valid photo ID<i> </i>(examples: state-issued driver's license, passport, or military ID) </li>
<li>Check or money order. The cost is $50 if you need a new copy of your Panama Canal Zone record.<ol>
<li>Make payable to the "U.S. Department of State"</li>
<li>Include a complete mailing address on the check</li>
<li>Must be payable in U.S. dollars through a U.S. bank</li>
</ol>
</li>
</ol>
<p>Mail your notarized Form DS-5542, photocopy of your ID, and payment to:</p>
<p>    U.S. Department of State<br>
    Passport Vital Records<br>
    44132 Mercure Circle<br>
    PO Box 1213<br>
    Sterling, VA 20166-1213</p>
<ul>
</ul>

        <div class="additional_component parsys"></div>
 
    </div>
</div>
</div>

gold_text:
How to Request a Copy of a Panama Canal Zone Record

We issue copies of birth and death records from the Panama Canal Zone that were issued between 1904 and 1979.

You can request a copy of these records if you are:

The individual listed on the document, 
A legal guardian of the individual listed on the document,
An authorized government agency, or
A person who has written permission from the individual listed on the document.

The Panama Canal Commission kept the birth records of persons born in the Panama Canal Zone between 1904 and 1979. In December 1999, the Commission gave the records to the U.S. Department of State.

People born in the former Panama Canal Zone did not automatically get U.S. citizenship at birth. In addition to a Panama Canal Zone birth certificate, U.S. passport applicants must submit evidence of their parents U.S. citizenship to prove their claim to U.S. citizenship.
